DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG1: You must be wearing an ^3EXO Suit^7 in order to use an ^3EXO Upgrade Locker^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG10: ^3EMZ's^7 will disable your ^3EXO Suit^7 if they hit you or if you attempt to boost away from them.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG12: ^3Exploders^7 will damage zombies around them when they die.  If you allow them to charge up, the blast will hurt you as well.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG13: The ^3Decontamination Zone^7 can cure multiple players at once.  It also kills any enemies in the immediate area.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG14: Heal your teammates quickly!  Players in ^3Last Stand^7 slowly lose EXO Upgrades over time until revived.  ^3Bleeding Out^7 takes away all EXO Upgrades and requires a new EXO Suit.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG15: ^3Credit Dispensers^7 often malfunction.  Use them to earn some spare credits.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG16: When you revive after ^3Bleeding Out^7, make it back to where you died in time to retrieve a dropped weapon.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG18: ^3Trash Chutes^7 provide a quick, if odorous, way to travel.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG19: ^3Security^7 will activate all ^3Traps^7 for a short time.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG2: Every ^3EXO Upgrade Locker^7 has its own ^3Power Station^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG20: ^3Traps^7 are great for taking out large groups of enemies, but be careful around them.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG21: ^3Power Surge^7 overwhelms the electric grid and makes all ^33D Printers^7 active for a short time.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG22: Activating ^3Camouflage^7 will make enemies ignore you for a brief time.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG23: "Burger Town patties are never cooked in a microwave!  Only the finest skillets are used to make the burger-licious meat we put inside our customers!" - Burger Town Employee Handbook
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG24: Before founding his popular Burger Town franchise, owner Norbert T. Spackleford III was a successful astronaut.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG25: Harry Bawlstein, manager of the local Hoard More, reportedly had his arm bitten off by a pet alligator.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG26: FACT: "Bubby the Burger Town Boy" is the animatronic mascot at all Burger Town drive-thru locations.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG27: ^3Survivors^7 won't move to their extraction point if you abandon them.  So... don't do that.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG28: When a ^3Survivor^7 is outlined in red he is about to die a most excruciating and terrible death.  Save him!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG29: ^3Survivors^7 can protect themselves during a rescue - but they still need your help to survive!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG3: Each weapon can be upgraded 20 times at the ^3Weapon Upgrade Station^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG30: It pays to care!  Successfully escort a ^3Survivor^7 to his extraction point and players will earn a free weapon upgrade at the end of the round.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG31: Failure to rescue a ^3Survivor^7 will disable all ^3Terminals^7 and cut power to active ^3Generators^7.  No pressure!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG32: When a ^3Survivor^7 is located, you have a limited time to get to him... before the zombies do.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG33: When ^3ATLAS^7 abandoned the town, they left behind several unorthodox ^3Traps^7 installed at key locations.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG34: Look for ^3Traps^7 throughout the town.  Each one offers its own flavor of anti-zombie mayhem.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG35: ^3Traps^7 can give you a well-deserved breather... but some can hurt you and your team!  Use with caution!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG36: If you hear a ^3Toxic Gas Zone^7 alarm, leave that area immediately or risk becoming infected.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG37: The longer you stay in a ^3Toxic Gas Zone^7, the less time you will have to decontaminate yourself.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG38: If you see gas in a doorway, that area is likely a ^3Toxic Gas Zone^7.  Proceed with caution!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG39: ^3Spikers^7 are zombies who spray shrapnel in all directions when they take damage.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG4: ^3EXO Slam^7 can be used in mid-air to kill or stun enemies on the ground.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG40: ^3Oozers^7 drip pools of acid on the ground as they chase you.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG41: ^3Meatbags^7 wear tactical armor, making them resistant to body and head-shots.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG42: ^3Goliaths^7 are infected human soldiers wearing powerful AST mech suits.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG43: ^3Goliaths^7 sport automated anti-air rockets that fire from their shoulder mounted cannons.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG44: ^3Goliaths^7 wield riot shields that block most damage from the front.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG45: The ^3"Magnetron" Q7 Microwave Weapon^7 will cook targets over a wide area and slow them down.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG46: You can use the ^3"Magnetron" Q7 Microwave Weapon^7 to slow large groups of zombies, allowing your teammates to take them out more easily.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG47: The ^33D Printer^7 randomly generates a new weapon each time it's activated - timing doesn't matter.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG48: Use the ^3Grenade Disposal Machine^7 for some extra ^3credits^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG49: The ^3Cargo^7 room has a disposal drone nicknamed ^3'Chompy'^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG5: ^3EXO Soldier^7 reduces hip fire spread, allows firing while sprinting and sliding, and increases weapon swap speed.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG50: The ship is outfitted with 4 ^3crew teleporters^7 to traverse quickly.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG51: ^3Sentinel's^7 research identified Oz as the source of all infection.  Are they right?
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG52: Lilith mourns the loss of Oz.  Is there a chance her friend is still alive?
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG53: Decker doesn't like to think.  He likes to shoot.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG54: Kahn was always hoping to sail away some day - just not like this.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG55: Lennox is betting Lilith, Decker, and Kahn can help him complete his mission - if they don't kill him first.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG56: ^3Decontamination Zones^7 are disabled if the room is contaminated.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG57: If you see a drone flying away from you, shoot it down!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG59: The ^3LZ-52 Limbo^7 is best used to clear concentrated groups of enemies.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG6: When playing solo, ^3EXO Medic^7 gives you one free revive.  It can only be repurchased a limited number of times.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG60: The ^3Repulsor^7 is useful for fending off nearby enemies.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG61: ^3Explosive Touch^7 kills enemies on contact.  Charge!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG62: ^3Open Fire^7 causes all ammunition to freely regenerate.  Keep that trigger firmly held down!
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG63: ^3Atlas Saboteurs^7 have boarded the ship and are attempting to contaminate it with ^3Manticore Gas^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG64: ^3Atlas Saboteurs^7 are ^3Camouflaged^7 and invisible to zombies.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG65: ^3Atlas Saboteurs^7 are still human.  Some equipment that works on zombies doesn't work on them.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG66: A ^3Goliath^7 is released when too many areas of the ship are contaminated at the start of a round.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG67: ^3Sentinel Reinforcements^7 can revive players and defuse ^3Manticore Gas^7 bombs.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG68: ^3EXO Stockpile^7 increases your ammo and grenade reserves.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG7: In a group, ^3EXO Medic^7 allows you to revive a teammate quickly.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG70: The ^3Advanced Repulsion Turret^7 slows, damages, and EMP's zombies.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG71: If you defuse the first bomb in time, it will drop a reward; otherwise, remaining ^3Atlas Saboteurs^7 will move to a nearby zone to cause more havoc.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG73: The ^3Blunderbuss^7 may be primitive, but it packs a wallop.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG74: The ^3KL03-Trident^7 is capable of seeking out hostile organic matter.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG75: The ^3KL03-Trident^7 can be used to kill enemies around corners.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG77: You're safe from becoming infected while piloting ^3Goliath-class Armor^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG78: Zombies have been reported in the area with combinations of previously-seen abilities.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG8: If a ^3Host^7 infects you, use the ^3Decontamination Zone^7 before you're out of time.  Otherwise, you'll turn.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG80: Someone's been tampering with the facility's built-in ^3Emergency Teleportation System^7.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG81: Oz was never a janitor working for Atlas.  That was only a memory implanted by Atlas.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG82: Lilith was once almost fired for hacking corporate emails - including Kahn's.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG83: If he survives, Kahn plans to sue the fuck out of Atlas.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG84: Decker cheated on his drug test to become an Atlas security guard.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG85: Lennox worked alongside Oz in Sentinel before the DNA bomb claimed him.
DIDYOUKNOWZM_MSG9: Upgrading your weapon at the ^3Weapon Upgrade Station^7 will refill its ammo.
ZOMBIES_ASSAULT_DRONE: Press and hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 for ^3AI Assault Drone^7.
ZOMBIES_DLC_POPUP_MESSAGE:
Additional content required:

Visit the in-game store to purchase DLC map pack content or Season Pass. Install the DLC map pack in order to access Exo Zombies.

The unique Exo Zombies co-op experience is all-new to Call of Duty: Advanced Warfare DLC. This new mode brings the movements, abilities, and weapons of the exoskeleton into battle against the undead.
ZOMBIES_DLC_POPUP_TITLE: Call of Duty: Advanced Warfare - Exo Zombies
ZOMBIES_MOVIE_UNLOCKED_MSG: Congrats! You unlocked a secret story cinematic of our heroes. You can watch it now or find it later by selecting STORY in the main menu.
ZOMBIES_MUST_LOGIN: You must sign in before you can play Exo Zombies
ZOMBIES_PICKUP_EXPLOSIVE_DRONE: Press and hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Pickup ^3Explosive Drone^7
ZOMBIES_ROCKET_DRONE: Press and hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 for ^3AI Rocket Assault Drone^7.
